criteria: Asks one question at a time
Follows up based on candidate's answer

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Good morning, Alex. Thank you for coming in today. Can you start by telling me a little bit about your background and why you're interested in this Data

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I have 6 years of experience in machine learning and AI. I've worked at both startups and large tech companies.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: That's great. Let's dive into some technical questions. How would you approach feature engineering for a classification problem?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: At my last company, I built a recommendation system that increased engagement by 30%. I used collaborative filtering and deep learning.

conversation.speaker: assistant
conversation.text: Can you walk me through how you handled missing values during data preprocessing?
